calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ETSY, INC's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment:

The unopposed "joint motion for approval of Proposition 65 settlement and [proposed] consent judgment" is granted.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2022 Set For Trial On Mar-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
